# hifisr soft_paths example for a Conda/Mamba environment on Linux.
# Copy this file to deps/soft_paths.txt or pass it with:
#   --config soft_paths=deps/soft_paths_conda.txt
# Replace /path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr and the MECAT2 path with real paths.
# environment.yml installs the other listed command-line tools into the Conda env.
# Format: software_name<TAB>absolute_path_to_executable
python	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/python
minimap2	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/minimap2
samtools	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/samtools
seqkit	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/seqkit
mecat	/path/to/MECAT2/Linux-amd64/bin/mecat.pl
blastn	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/blastn
bcftools	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/bcftools
bamtools	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/bamtools
pigz	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/pigz
bandage	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/Bandage
hifiasm	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/hifiasm
flye	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/flye
canu	/path/to/miniconda3/envs/hifisr/bin/canu
